# jamfprotect_analytic_managed (List Resource)

Lists Jamf-managed analytics in Jamf Protect for use with `terraform plan -generate-config-out`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfprotect_analytic_managed" "example" {
  provider = jamfprotect
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String) Optional name prefix filter applied to listed analytics.
